style_effects: Flickering translucent purple-black aura with jagged edges, casting elongated, distorted shadows that bend unnaturally around the body; slow-drifting mist particles swirl in eerie violet hues, glowing faintly as they drift upward, while faint energy pulses ripple through the skin like ghostly ripples in a still pond. Cold, ethereal blue-white luminescence emanates from within, casting a haunting glow that makes the mist particles shimmer with ghostly translucence. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
